title: Point of Interest (POI) Admin CRUD API

tasks.title: Add PointOfInterestAdminSearchSchema
tasks.description: Create packages/schemas/src/entities/point-of-interest/point-of-interest.admin-search.schema.ts mirroring attraction.admin-search.schema.ts. Extend AdminSearchBaseSchema with: type (PointOfInterestTypeEnumSchema.optional()), isFeatured/isBuiltin/hasOwnPage/verified (queryBooleanParam()), destinationId (DestinationIdSchema.optional()), categoryId (PoiCategoryIdSchema.optional() — NOTE real name, not PointOfInterestCategoryIdSchema). Export from index.ts. Tests: valid/invalid parse cases for each filter.

tasks.title: Add PointOfInterest batch schemas
tasks.description: Create packages/schemas/src/entities/point-of-interest/point-of-interest.batch.schema.ts (structural copy of attraction.batch.schema.ts): PointOfInterestBatchRequestSchema (ids uuid[].min(1).max(100), optional fields), PointOfInterestBatchItemSchema (PointOfInterestSchema.partial().required({id:true})), PointOfInterestBatchResponseSchema (array nullable). CRITICAL (R-4): requiredFields must be ['id','slug'] NOT ['id','name'] — POI has no name column. Export from index.ts. Tests: batch request validation.

subtasks.title: Create batch schema file with id/slug required

tasks.title: Add destination-relation management schemas
tasks.description: Add PointOfInterestUpdateDestinationRelationInputSchema ({destinationId, pointOfInterestId, relation}) and PointOfInterestDestinationListItemSchema ({destinationId, destinationName, destinationSlug, relation}) to .crud.schema.ts (or new .destination-relation.schema.ts). Use PointOfInterestDestinationRelationEnumSchema (real name — NOT DestinationPointOfInterest...). Export from index.ts. Tests: valid/invalid relation enum.

tasks.title: Add category-assignment schemas
tasks.description: Add PointOfInterestSetCategoriesInputSchema ({pointOfInterestId, categoryIds: array(PoiCategoryIdSchema).min(1).max(10), primaryCategoryId: PoiCategoryIdSchema}).refine(primaryCategoryId in categoryIds, 'zodError.pointOfInterest.categories.primaryNotInSet') and PointOfInterestCategoryAssignmentSchema ({id: PoiCategoryIdSchema, slug, nameI18n: I18nTextSchema, icon nullish, isPrimary}). Use PoiCategoryIdSchema (real name). Add i18n error key. Export from index.ts. Tests: refine passes/fails, max-10 cap.

subtasks.title: Unit tests for refine + max cap

tasks.title: Add updatePointOfInterestDestinationRelation service method
tasks.description: New method on PointOfInterestService (packages/service-core/src/services/point-of-interest/point-of-interest.service.ts), same shape as addPointOfInterestToDestination: runWithLoggingAndValidation, parallel existence checks, ServiceError(NOT_FOUND) if POI/destination/relation row missing (AC-4: must NOT silently create). Calls this.relatedModel.update({destinationId, pointOfInterestId}, {relation}). Input: PointOfInterestUpdateDestinationRelationInputSchema. NO permission-hook change (Decision 1: keep POINT_OF_INTEREST_UPDATE via existing _canUpdate-style checker). Tests: happy update, NOT_FOUND on missing row.

tasks.title: Add setCategoriesForPointOfInterest (transactional full-replace)
tasks.description: Decision 2: add to the EXISTING PointOfInterestCategoryService (packages/service-core/src/services/poi-category/point-of-interest-category.service.ts), NOT PointOfInterestService. Full-replace: validate primaryCategoryId in categoryIds, validate every id resolves to a non-deleted poi_categories row (parallel Promise.all), then inside withServiceTransaction: delete all r_poi_category rows for the POI and insert the new set with isPrimary on exactly primaryCategoryId. Reuse existing getCategoriesForPointOfInterest for reads. Use RPoiCategoryModel via generic findAll({pointOfInterestId}). Tests: AC-5 exact-set + one-primary, AC-6 rollback on bad id mid-array (previous assignment intact).

subtasks.title: Validate primary + all category ids exist

tasks.title: Extend admin-search filters (hasOwnPage, verified, categoryId)
tasks.description: In point-of-interest.service.ts: extend buildSearchWhere to pass hasOwnPage and verified plain-column filters (same pattern as isFeatured). Add private resolveCategoryIdFilter(categoryId) mirroring resolveDestinationIdFilter but joining through r_poi_category; AND its additionalConditions with the destination filter's when both present (AC-2/R-5: AND not OR). type/isFeatured/isBuiltin/destinationId already supported. Tests: hasOwnPage+verified filters, destinationId+categoryId AND semantics.

tasks.title: Create standard CRUD admin route tier (9 files + index)
tasks.description: Create apps/api/src/routes/point-of-interest/admin/ as structural copy of attraction/admin/: list.ts, getById.ts, create.ts, update.ts, patch.ts, delete.ts, hardDelete.ts, restore.ts, batch.ts, index.ts. Swap service to PointOfInterestService, schemas to POI equivalents (§6.1 table). Copy patch.ts customRateLimit and getById.ts cacheTTL/rateLimit overrides verbatim. batch handler requiredFields ['id','slug']. Permissions per §6.1 table.

subtasks.title: Copy 9 route files with PointOfInterest rewire

tasks.title: Register admin POI routes
tasks.description: point-of-interest/index.ts: export { adminPointOfInterestRoutes } from './admin/index.js'. apps/api/src/routes/index.ts: add app.route('/api/v1/admin/points-of-interest', adminPointOfInterestRoutes) in admin tier block, alphabetically after attractions. No change to public mount.

tasks.title: Integration tests: standard CRUD tier
tasks.description: One integration test per CRUD route (list/getById/create/update/patch/delete/hardDelete/restore/batch): happy path (200/201) + permission-denied (403 for actor missing the route's permission per §6.1). AC-1. Also AC-2: list combining destinationId+categoryId returns only POIs matching BOTH.

tasks.title: Destination-relation sub-router + tests
tasks.description: Create apps/api/src/routes/point-of-interest/admin/destinations.ts mounted at /{id}/destinations on admin router (nested path on SAME router, like attraction batch). GET (VIEW) → getDestinationsByPointOfInterest + relation value; POST (CREATE) → addPointOfInterestToDestination (409 ALREADY_EXISTS); PATCH /{destinationId} (UPDATE) → updatePointOfInterestDestinationRelation; DELETE /{destinationId} (DELETE) → removePointOfInterestFromDestination. Decision 1 permissions. Tests: AC-3 (409), AC-4 (404 no silent create), AC-7 (per-permission 403).

tasks.title: Category-assignment routes + tests
tasks.description: Create apps/api/src/routes/point-of-interest/admin/categories.ts mounted at /{id}/categories. GET (POINT_OF_INTEREST_VIEW) → PointOfInterestCategoryService.getCategoriesForPointOfInterest. PUT (POINT_OF_INTEREST_UPDATE) → setCategoriesForPointOfInterest (full-replace). Decision 2: call the existing category service. Tests: AC-5 (primary not in set → 400 before write; valid → exact set + one primary), AC-6 (rollback).

tasks.title: AI-translate: add pointOfInterest entity (6 sites)
tasks.description: §6.5/§14.2 — 6 edit sites across 2 files. ai-translate.service.ts: (1) widen TranslatableEntityType union, (2) ENTITY_FIELDS {name:['nameI18n'],description:['descriptionI18n']}, (3) getEntityTable tables map add pointOfInterest→pointsOfInterest, (4) I18N_COLUMN_MAP {name:'nameI18n',description:'descriptionI18n'}. routes/ai/admin/translate.ts: widen the three z.enum literals (lines ~35,41,52) to include 'pointOfInterest'. Tests: AC-8 integration — translate POI nameI18n/descriptionI18n into missing locale, persists.

tasks.title: Gate-matrix rows for all new admin routes
tasks.description: AC-9/R-7 — add a row to docs/billing/endpoint-gate-matrix.md for every new admin route file (9 CRUD + 4 destination + 2 category = 15) with Decision: none and a one-line reason (POI admin routes carry no billing entitlement gate). Confirm apps/api/test/middlewares/endpoint-gate-matrix.guard.test.ts passes.

tasks.title: Update spec closeout + Linear notes
tasks.description: Record env/migrations (none) + design reversals (Decision 1/2) on the HOS-143 Linear issue per §14. Note in PR description that destination-relation gate stays POINT_OF_INTEREST_* (not MANAGE) per R-2 workflow.

tasks.title: Quality gate: typecheck + suites + coverage
tasks.description: AC-10 — pnpm typecheck and full apps/api + packages/schemas + packages/service-core test suites pass; ≥90% coverage on the two new service methods (T-005, T-006) and the two new resolver helpers (T-007). Run scoped/sequential per resource-care rule.
